---
title: "ChronicleConfidence"
---
<!-- DO NOT EDIT! This file was auto-generated by crates/build/re_types_builder/src/codegen/docs/website.rs -->

Confidence score (0.0 to 1.0) for a Chronicle event link.

Controls visual opacity of link arcs in the ChronicleTimelineView.

## Rerun datatype
[`Float32`](../datatypes/float32.md)


## Arrow datatype
```
float32
```
